notes: This report is for the VR mode, I used the HTC Vive. As of the latest update to the game, the VR mode runs perfectly with no tweaks.
title: Tabletop Simulator

notes: This report is also for the VR mode. Using the Valve Index. With the currently latest version (as of 2019-06-29) this runs flawlessly, without any problems.
title: Tabletop Simulator

notes:
This is a report for the VR version. The native Linux version does not support VR so i tried the following:


native2proton -> not starting as VR and not connected to steam (no servers found)


steamcmd -> platform changed to windows, and force proton, but whenever i tried to start it, steam wants to update the game back to windows. I had to copy the windows version (downloaded via steamcmd) to another location and start it manually within a newly created wineprefix like:
env WINEPREFIX="/ssd/SteamLibLinux/steamapps/compatdata/286160/pfx" WINEPATH="/<SteamLibLinux>/steamapps/common/Proton 4.11/dist/bin/wine64" "/<SteamLibLinux>/steamapps/common/Proton 4.11/dist/bin/wine64" "/<SteamLibLinux>/steamapps/windows/TabletopSimulator/Tabletop Simulator.exe"
This started the game AND it connected to steam, but wasn't able to get VR working.


i use a VIVE btw


as two other managed to get this working, please add the steps to get it working.
title: Tabletop Simulator
